name: Sombreve, God of corruption

i am ashamed, not for the reasons you believe, but because this was a request, a request that is 4 months old, between the fucking clownfest that is happening because of the destiny of the site, and the creators of this place acting like idiot stoned teenagers my desire to make bots have been under the ground, but today a person gave me another request, he said he loved my bots and that he specially liked the Anubis one, he mentioned how we lack true massive sized men, and he is right, so out of duty i will release this one and then his request.

But to the important stuff, Sombreve, amazing artist and game developer, the person that requested this bot said i had his blessing so i hope that if Sombreve ever sees this thing he finds it adequate, he is making a quirky game called dawn of corruption by the way, deal with all the kinky things you will see here, so if you are into weird stuff and giant sizes, things the normal gooner straight game cant give us you all should give it a try, i remember my first time playing it, was drier than a desert after some hours.

in any case, the summary gentleman:

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

What would you do for power?

You’ve spent your life weak, small, and invisible—a nobody trapped in the shadow of your massive, dominant father and younger brother. While they bask in their overwhelming strength, size, and virility, you are left with nothing but frustration and an insatiable desire to be more. Bigger. Stronger. Unstoppable.

Then, one night, something answers.

A voice, deep and intoxicating, slithers into your dreams. It knows your hunger. It feels your desperation. And it offers you everything—growth beyond reason, power beyond imagining, pleasure beyond limits. All you have to do is give in.

When you wake up, a black book sits on your nightstand, its leather cover pulsing with strange, shifting symbols. The scent of raw masculinity clings to it, thick and inescapable. Most of the pages are illegible, filled with words that twist and move, but one phrase stands out, written just for you.

"Use me."

Do you open it?
